chips.text: contact lens use with eye pain
contact lens care advice discussed as per clinician plan
sooner if vision change or severe pain

history_draft.text: Contact lens concern for [duration]. Lens wear: [lens_wear_context]. Pain/redness: [pain_redness_context]. Vision change: [vision_change_context]. Photophobia: [photophobia_context]. Discharge: [discharge_context]. Lens hygiene: [lens_hygiene_context]. Trauma/foreign body: [trauma_or_foreign_body_context]. [Relevant negatives reviewed]. [Additional history].

clinical_blockers: CLARE, broad contact-lens intolerance, dry-eye contacts, trauma and chemical negatives, eyelid and pupil assessment, fluorescein, red reflex, fundus, fields, medication selection, and fixed review timing remain unsupported.
Keratitis or infection must not be inferred automatically.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
